data.current_summary: Process an image using a plain source URL
data.current_description: Fetches the source image from the given URL and applies the specified processing options. The source URL is provided in plain text (percent-encode special characters).
data.summary_suggestion: Resize and process image from plain text URL
data.description_suggestion: Fetches the source image from the provided plain text URL and applies the specified processing options (resizing, cropping, format conversion, etc.). The source URL must be percent-encoded for special characters. Returns the processed image in the specified format. Requires valid URL signature for authentication. Processing is performed server-side and the result is streamed to the client.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on what processing options are available, what format the response takes, and authentication requirements. Added details about processing capabilities, response format, authentication via signature, and server-side processing behavior to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_summary: Process an image using a Base64-encoded source URL

data.description_suggestion: Fetches the source image from the Base64-encoded URL and applies the specified processing options (resizing, cropping, format conversion, etc.). Processing is performed server-side and the result is streamed to the client.
